scripts.dev: concurrently -n pos,admin,www,coupons,menu,order -c cyan,magenta,blue,yellow,green,violet "npm run dev -w @pos/pos-terminal" "npm run dev -w @pos/admin-portal" "npm run dev -w @pos/marketing-site" "npm run dev -w @pos/coupons-site" "npm run dev -w @pos/online-menu" "npm run dev -w @pos/online-order"
scripts.dev:lan: concurrently -n pos,admin,www,coupons,menu,order -c cyan,magenta,blue,yellow,green,violet "npm run dev -w @pos/pos-terminal -- --host" "npm run dev -w @pos/admin-portal -- --host" "npm run dev -w @pos/marketing-site -- --host" "npm run dev -w @pos/coupons-site -- --host" "npm run dev -w @pos/online-menu -- --host" "npm run dev -w @pos/online-order -- --host"
scripts.build:production: npm run build -w @pos/marketing-site && npm run build -w @pos/coupons-site && npm run build -w @pos/online-menu && npm run build -w @pos/online-order && npm run build -w @pos/pos-terminal && npm run build -w @pos/admin-portal
